ItacAcademyItem.Name: Minervale (Accademia)
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: Source for this Academy is Spinelli, David, Oratio. In die anniversaria illustrissimi cardinalis Zeni habita Venetijs in D. Marci templo. Die 30 mensis Maij anno Domini 1597 a Davide Spinellio Minervali academico (Venetijs: apud Nicolaum Morettum, 1597)
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
